problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
